name: United National Bank
summary: United National Bank offers various banking products and services in the Grady County. The company offers checking and savings accounts; credit cards; individual retirement accounts and certificates of deposits; business and merchant accounts; mortgage loans; direct deposit and SMS guardian services; and safe deposit boxes. It also offers mortgage, construction, business, personal, automobile, home improvement, agricultural, and installment loans; and online and mobile banking services. The company is based in Cairo, Georgia.
